ipc_main.description: Main process IPC handlers — renderer can send arbitrary data to these

ipc_renderer.description: Renderer-side IPC calls — track what data is sent to main process

protocol_handler.description: Custom protocol handlers receive URLs from OS — fully attacker-controlled

deep_link.description: Deep links from external apps/websites — attacker-controlled URL

dom_input.description: DOM-based input sources — attacker-controlled via navigation

network_response.description: Network responses rendered in the app — MITM or malicious server

file_input.description: File content loaded by user — malicious file scenarios

clipboard.description: Clipboard content — attacker needs prior clipboard poisoning

drag_drop.description: Drag and drop events — limited attacker control

argv.description: Command line arguments and environment variables
